string.name: adb_pair_fill_required
string.value: Please enter pairing address and code

string.name: adb_pair_failed_resolve
string.value: Unable to resolve the pairing address

string.name: adb_pair_failed_refused
string.value: The device refused the connection. Please confirm the pairing page is still open and use the pairing port

string.name: adb_pair_failed_timeout
string.value: Connection timed out. Please check the device and network

string.name: adb_pair_failed_code_or_expired
string.value: The pairing code is incorrect, expired, or the pairing session has changed

string.name: adb_pair_failed_connect
string.value: Unable to connect to the device pairing service

string.name: wireless_adb_pairing_desc
string.value: Use Android wireless debugging pairing code to bind this app with the target device.

string.name: wireless_adb_pairing_step_1
string.value: 1. On Android, open Developer options and enable Wireless debugging.

string.name: wireless_adb_pairing_step_2
string.value: 2. Tap Pair device with pairing code and keep that screen open.

string.name: wireless_adb_pairing_step_3
string.value: 3. Enter the displayed IP:port and the 6-digit pairing code below.

string.name: wireless_adb_pairing_step_4
string.value: 4. After pairing succeeds, use the wireless debugging connect port as the device ADB port.

string.name: regenerate_note
string.value: Note: After regenerating keys, all connected devices will need to be re-authorized.

string.name: clear_logs_confirm_msg
string.value: Are you sure you want to clear all app logs?

string.name: restart_hint
string.value: App restart required for language changes to take effect.

string.name: add_device_hint
string.value: Click + button below to add device

string.name: init_control_page_error
string.value: Failed to initialize the control interface

string.name: extra_params_hint
string.value: Format: key=value, used to set server parameters not defined in the UI

string.name: connect_failed_hint
string.value: Connection failed. Please check if ADB is enabled on device or check your configuration.

string.name: permission_internet_reason
string.value: Network access is required to connect to devices

string.name: permission_network_info_reason
string.value: Network info is required to find devices

string.name: permission_microphone_reason
string.value: Microphone access is required for audio forwarding

string.name: permission_read_pasteboard_reason
string.value: Clipboard access is required to sync content

string.name: timeout_dialog_message
string.value:
Connection timed out. Usually because:
1. Authorization dialog not confirmed on device.
2. Network connection failed.
3. Server exception, please check logs.

string.name: connect_timeout_toast
string.value: Connection timed out. Please ensure USB debugging is authorized on the device.

string.name: server_prepare_failed
string.value: Failed to prepare server. Please check device connection.

string.name: adb_auth_failed
string.value: ADB authentication failed. Please revoke USB debugging authorizations on device and try again.

string.name: adb_native_connect_failed
string.value: Failed to establish native connection to device.

string.name: adb_wireless_tls_failed
string.value: Wireless debugging handshake failed. Pair again and make sure you are using the connect port shown on the Wireless debugging screen.

string.name: adb_wireless_tls_interrupted
string.value: Wireless debugging was interrupted by the device. Make sure pairing is completed, reopen Wireless debugging on Android, and try again.

string.name: adb_wireless_protocol_failed
string.value: Wireless debugging protocol error. Pair again and make sure the connect port is correct.

string.name: adb_connect_timeout
string.value: Connection timed out. Please check network or device status.

string.name: adb_auth_timeout
string.value: Authorization timed out. Please confirm 'Allow USB debugging' on the device.

string.name: adb_key_regenerate_confirm_msg
string.value: This will reset authorization status for all devices. You will need to re-authorize 'Allow USB Debugging' on devices when connecting. Continue?

string.name: adb_key_import_fail_empty
string.value: Import failed: Key cannot be empty

string.name: adb_key_import_fail_format
string.value: Import failed: Invalid format or characters

string.name: help_intro
string.value: This is a third-party HarmonyOS client for Scrcpy (https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy).

string.name: help_feature
string.value: Supported: Control Android devices via ADB TCP/IP without Root.

string.name: help_step_1
string.value: Enable 'Developer Options' and 'USB Debugging' on Android device.

string.name: help_step_2
string.value: Connect Android to PC, download ADB tools, run 'adb devices' to confirm connection.

string.name: help_step_3
string.value: Run 'adb tcpip 5555' (5555 is the port, can be changed).

string.name: help_step_4
string.value: Add device in this app: enter Android IP and port (5555). Configure and Connect.

string.name: help_note
string.value: Note: First connection requires confirming 'Allow USB Debugging' on the Android device.

string.name: adb_auth_message
string.value:
Waiting for authorization from the controlled device.
Please check the controlled device and tap [Allow].

string.name: about_client_desc
string.value: This project is partially derived from mingzhixian's Easycontrol project, released under GPL-3.0.

string.name: about_server_desc
string.value: The scrcpy-server binary distributed with this app is unmodified.

string.name: help_config_ref
string.value: For specific configuration items, please refer to the Scrcpy official documentation

string.name: config_show_bottom_nav_bar_desc
string.value: Show the app's bottom navigation bar while controlling the device.

string.name: config_video_codec_desc
string.value: Select video codec (H.264, H.265, AV1). H.265 usually provides better compression.

string.name: config_max_size_desc
string.value: Limit max video width or height (e.g., 1024). 0 means original resolution.

string.name: config_bitrate_desc
string.value: Video stream bitrate (bps). Default 8Mbps. Higher values improve quality but increase latency.

string.name: config_max_fps_desc
string.value: Limit capture frame rate. Supported on Android 10+.

string.name: config_crop_desc
string.value: Mirror only a part of the screen (Width:Height:X:Y).

string.name: config_audio_codec_desc
string.value: Select audio codec (OPUS, AAC, RAW, FLAC).

string.name: config_show_touches_desc
string.value: Show physical touch points on the Android device.

string.name: config_stay_awake_desc
string.value: Prevent the device from sleeping while connected.

string.name: config_clipboard_desc
string.value: Device clipboard syncs to this device automatically. Click button to send this device's clipboard to controlled device.

string.name: config_turn_screen_on_connect_desc
string.value: Wake the controlled device screen when starting a connection.

string.name: config_keep_screen_on_connected_desc
string.value: Keep this device screen awake during an active connection to avoid sleep.

string.name: config_turn_screen_off_connect_desc
string.value: Turn off device physical screen (black screen) after connection to save power.

string.name: config_turn_screen_off_close_desc
string.value: Turn off device screen when disconnecting.

string.name: config_downsize_error_desc
string.value: Automatically reduce resolution and retry if encoding fails due to high resolution.

string.name: config_force_adb_forward_desc
string.value: Disable reverse-first mode and always use classic ADB forward connections.

string.name: config_connect_start_desc
string.value: Try to automatically connect to this device when the app starts.

string.name: config_server_log_desc
string.value: Set scrcpy-server log level on the device.

string.name: adb_auth_disconnected
string.value: Device disconnected during authorization. Please check connection.
